item.title: 医疗保健市场中的区块链：2027 年关键应用和技术研究 | Blockchain in Healthcare Market: A Study of the Key Applications and Technologies 2027
item.description:
作为 Emergen Research 全球区块链医疗保健市场研究报告的一部分，分析了医疗保健行业区块链的关键业务细节和广泛的地理分布。 除了全面的定性和定量分析外，该研究还包含有关医疗保健市场区块链的重要统计数据。 还包括成熟和新兴参与者的概况，包括业务概述、产品组合、战略联盟和业务扩展战略。 当前的 COVID-19 大流行预计将对区块链在医疗保健行业的增长产生影响，这主要是由于行动限制以及封锁对供需的影响。 在 COVID-19 大流行之后，全球市场的多个领域都受到了影响，医疗保健中的区块链很可能就是其中之一。 经济放缓和需求的动态变化将进一步阻碍该行业的增长。 该报告涵盖了 COVID-19 大流行对医疗保健行业整体区块链的影响分析。

根据 Emergen Research 的一份新报告，到 2027 年，全球区块链在医疗保健市场的规模预计将达到 57.98 亿美元。 由于其在供应链管理 (SCM)、临床数据交换和互操作性以及理赔调整和计费管理等方面的应用不断增加，医疗保健领域的区块链正在保持高速增长。 多家医院和组织正在实施区块链技术来记录、分析和监控患者信息。 此外，假药供应增加，可以通过在医疗保健领域采用区块链技术来抑制这一问题。 全球政府正在采取措施应对这种情况。

获取报告的免费样本@ www.emergenresearch.com/request-sample/...

市场概况：

该报告根据不同的产品类型、应用程序、最终用户行业以及市场已经建立的世界主要地区，将区块链在医疗保健市场中进行了划分。 该报告准确地提供了每个细分市场的供需比和生产和消费量的见解。

您需要了解这将如何影响当今以及未来 10 年医疗保健市场中的区块链：

我们 250 页的报告专门为您提供 194 个表格和 189 个图表/图形。 该报告重点介绍了该行业的主要利润丰厚领域，以便您现在就可以瞄准这些领域。 它包含对全球、区域和国家销售和增长的深入分析。 它为您重点介绍了竞争对手做出的主要成功趋势、变化和收入预测。

报告中分析的主要参与者：

该报告全面概述了竞争格局，涵盖公司概况、生产和制造能力、产品组合、扩张战略以及业务计划，如并购、合资、合作、伙伴关系、产品发布和品牌推广等.

根据区域分析，市场主要分布在以下主要地理区域：

北美（美国、加拿大） 欧洲（英国、意大利、德国、法国、欧盟其他国家/地区） 亚太地区（印度、日本、中国、韩国、澳大利亚、亚太地区其他国家/地区） 拉丁美洲（智利、巴西、阿根廷、其他国家/地区）拉丁美洲）中东和非洲（沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、南非、中东和非洲其他地区）

此外，该报告将医疗保健市场中的区块链划分为关键细分市场和子细分市场，以分析该行业的产品类型和应用范围。 它还提供了有关预计在预计时间表内显示显着增长的细分市场的预测。

医疗保健市场区块链的市场细分

该市场根据类型、应用程序和区域进行细分。 每个细分市场的增长都提供了与按类型和应用划分的生产和销售相关的准确预测，包括该期间的数量和价值。 此分析可以帮助希望通过瞄准新兴市场和利基市场来扩展业务的读者。 市场份额数据在全球和区域层面均有提供。 报告涵盖的地区包括北美、欧洲、亚太地区、拉丁美洲以及中东和非洲。 研究分析师评估主要竞争对手的市场地位，并为每家公司提供竞争分析。 对于这项研究，本报告根据产品、应用和区域对全球区块链在医疗保健市场进行细分：

本报告涵盖的部分是：

类型展望（收入，十亿美元；2017-2027）许可/私有区块链无许可/公共区块链应用前景（收入，十亿美元；2017-2027）供应链管理临床数据交换和互操作性索赔调整和计费管理其他最终用户展望（收入，十亿美元；2017-2027）制药公司医疗保健提供商医疗保健付款人其他

要了解有关该报告的更多信息，请访问@ www.emergenresearch.com/industry-report……

竞技地形：

由于在多个国际和本地市场领域运营的知名公司的存在，医疗保健行业的全球区块链得到了高度整合。 这些参与者凭借强大的地理覆盖范围和大量的生产设施在行业中占据主导地位。 这些公司相互竞争激烈，在各自的技术能力、产品开发、创新和产品定价策略方面都表现出色。

医疗保健市场报告中的区块链概述：

制造商的介绍、产品范围、市场概况和机会分析，包括销售、收入和价格分析 竞争格局的综合分析 对主要竞争对手及其业务战略和市场规模的广泛分析 市场区域分析以及销售、收入、市场份额和全球地位 对市场的国家分析以及类型、应用和制造 对既有参与者和新进入者的战略建议 深入分析区块链中的风险、约束和限制医疗保健行业

感谢您阅读我们的报告。 请与我们联系以了解有关报告或报告定制的更多信息。 我们的团队将确保报告最适合满足您的要求。

关于我们：

我们的解决方案完全专注于您的目标，即定位、定位和分析跨人口统计、跨行业的消费者行为转变，并帮助客户做出更明智的业务决策。 我们提供市场情报研究，确保跨多个行业（包括医疗保健、接触点、化学品、类型和能源）进行相关和基于事实的研究。 我们不断更新我们的研究产品，以确保我们的客户了解市场上存在的最新趋势。 我们的行业经验和针对任何研究问题开发具体解决方案的能力为我们的客户提供了确保超越各自竞争对手的优势的能力。

联系我们：

埃里克·李

企业销售专员

新兴研究 | 网址： www.emergenresearch.com

直线：+1 (604) 757-9756

邮箱： sales@emergenresearch.com

访问以获取更多见解： www.emergenresearch.com/insights

探索我们的定制情报服务 | 成长咨询服务

一旦暂停，tanishah3232 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，tanishah3232 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，tanishah3232 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 tanishah3232 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 tanishah3232 的方法：

降低 tanishah3232 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 tanishah3232 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

As part of Emergen Research's Global Blockchain in Healthcare Market Research Report, key business details and extensive geographical spread of the Blockchain in Healthcare industry have been analyzed. As well as a comprehensive qualitative and quantitative analysis, the study contains crucial statistics about the Blockchain in Healthcare market. Also included are profiles of established and emerging players, including business overviews, product portfolios, strategic alliances, and business expansion strategies. The current COVID-19 pandemic is expected to have an effect on the growth of the Blockchain in Healthcare industry, primarily as a result of movement restrictions and impact on supply and demand due to lockdowns. In the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, several sectors of the global market have been affected, and Blockchain in Healthcare will likely be among them. Economic slowdown and dynamic changes in demand will further hinder the growth of the sector. The report covers the impact analysis of the COVID-19 pandemic on the overall Blockchain in Healthcare industry.

The global blockchain in healthcare Market is expected to reach USD 5,798.0 Million by 2027, according to a new report by Emergen Research. The blockchain in healthcare is observing a high growth rate attributable to its rising application in supply chain management (SCM), clinical data exchange & interoperability, and claims adjustment & billing management, among others. Several hospitals and organizations are implementing the blockchain technology to record, analyze, and monitor patient information. Moreover, there is an increase in the supply of counterfeit drugs, and this issue can be restrained by adopting the blockchain technology in the healthcare sector. Initiatives are being taken by the government across the globe to tackle the situation.

Get a FREE sample of the report @ www.emergenresearch.com/request-sample/…

Market Overview:

The report bifurcates the Blockchain in Healthcare market on the basis of different product types, applications, end-user industries, and key regions of the world where the market has already established its presence. The report accurately offers insights into the supply-demand ratio and production and consumption volume of each segment.

You need to discover how this will impact the Blockchain in Healthcare market today, and over the next 10 years:

Our 250-page report provides 194 tables and 189 charts/graphs exclusively to you. The report highlights key lucrative areas in the industry so you can target them – Now. It contains in-depth analysis of global, regional and national sales and growth. It highlights for you the key successful trends, changes and revenue projections made by your competitors.

Prominent Players Analyzed in the Report:

IBM, Microsoft, Gem, Chronicled, Hashed Health, Factom, Guardtime, Pokitdok, Patientory, and Blockpharma

The report offers a comprehensive overview of the competitive landscape and covers company profiles, production and manufacturing capacity, product portfolio, expansion strategies, and business initiatives such as mergers and acquisitions, joint ventures, collaborations, partnerships, and product launches and brand promotions among others.

According to the regional analysis, the market is primarily spread over key geographical regions as follows:

North America (U.S., Canada) Europe (U.K., Italy, Germany, France, Rest of EU) Asia Pacific (India, Japan, China, South Korea, Australia, Rest of APAC) Latin America (Chile, Brazil, Argentina, Rest of Latin America) Middle East & Africa (Saudi Arabia, U.A.E., South Africa, Rest of MEA)

Furthermore, the report divides the Blockchain in Healthcare market into key segments and sub-segments to offer an analysis of the product type and application spectrum of the industry. It also offers predictions about the segments expected to show significant growth during the projected timeline.

Market Segmentations of the Blockchain in Healthcare Market

This market is segmented based on Types, Applications, and Regions. The growth of each segment provides accurate forecasts related to production and sales by Types and Applications, in terms of volume and value for the period. This analysis can help readers looking to expand their business by targeting emerging and niche markets. Market share data is given on both global and regional levels. Regions covered in the report are North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, and Middle East & Africa. Research analysts assess the market positions of the leading competitors and provide competitive analysis for each company. For this study, this report segments the global Blockchain in Healthcare market on the basis of product, application, and region:

Segments Covered in this report are:

Type Outlook (Revenue, USD Billion; 2017-2027) Permissioned/Private Blockchain Permissionless/Public Blockchain Application Outlook (Revenue, USD Billion; 2017-2027) Supply Chain Management Clinical Data Exchange & Interoperability Claims Adjustment & Billing Management Others End-Users Outlook (Revenue, USD Billion; 2017-2027) Pharmaceutical Companies Healthcare Providers Healthcare Payers Others

To know more about the report, visit @ www.emergenresearch.com/industry-report…

Competitive Terrain:

The global Blockchain in Healthcare industry is highly consolidated owing to the presence of renowned companies operating across several international and local segments of the market. These players dominate the industry in terms of their strong geographical reach and a large number of production facilities. The companies are intensely competitive against one another and excel in their individual technological capabilities, as well as product development, innovation, and product pricing strategies.

Overview of the Blockchain in Healthcare Market Report:

Introduction, Product Scope, Market Overview, and Opportunities Analysis of the Manufacturers with sales, revenue, and price analysis Comprehensive analysis of the competitive landscape Extensive profiling of the key competitors along with their business strategies and market size Regional analysis of the market along with sales, revenue, market share, and global position Country-wise analysis of the market along with types, applications, and manufacturing Strategic recommendations to established players as well as new entrants In-depth analysis of the risks, restraints, and limitations in the Blockchain in Healthcare industry

Thank you for reading our report. Please connect with us to know more about the report or the customization of the report. Our team will ensure the report is best suited to meet your requirements.

About Us:

Emergen Research is a market research and consulting company that provides syndicated research reports, customized research reports, and consulting services. Our solutions purely focus on your purpose to locate, target, and analyse consumer behavior shifts across demographics, across industries, and help clients make smarter business decisions. We offer market intelligence studies ensuring relevant and fact-based research across multiple industries, including Healthcare, Touch Points, Chemicals, Types, and Energy. We consistently update our research offerings to ensure our clients are aware of the latest trends existent in the market. Emergen Research has a strong base of experienced analysts from varied areas of expertise. Our industry experience and ability to develop a concrete solution to any research problems provides our clients with the ability to secure an edge over their respective competitors.

Contact Us:

Eric Lee

Corporate Sales Specialist

Emergen Research | Web: www.emergenresearch.com

Direct Line: +1 (604) 757-9756

E-mail: sales@emergenresearch.com

Visit for More Insights: www.emergenresearch.com/insights

Explore Our Custom Intelligence services | Growth Consulting Services

Once unsuspended, tanishah3232 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

If tanishah3232 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.author: tanishah3232

item.title: 经导管二尖瓣植入市场：2027 年关键应用和技术概览 | Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation Market: A Look at the Key Applications and Technologies 2027
item.description:
塔尼沙阿

发表于 5 月 15 日

最新的市场情报报告名为“全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场”，旨在为目标受众提供有关全球经导管二尖瓣植入行业的必要信息。 该报告详细分析了经导管二尖瓣植入市场的重要要素，包括关键驱动因素、制约因素、机会、局限性、威胁以及微观和宏观经济因素。 该报告仔细调查了当前的市场情况和基本增长前景。 该报告包含一个有组织的经导管二尖瓣植入市场动态数据库，可帮助市场分析师估计预计时间表内的全球市场增长率。 因此，由 Emergen Research 发布的这份报告是对经导管二尖瓣植入市场关键方面的详细汇编，包括主要参与者的产品供应、这些产品的广泛应用范围、主要细分市场、领先市场竞争者、他们的公司概况、定价策略、生产能力、创收计划、技术进步等等。

根据 Emergen Research 目前的分析，2019 年全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场规模为 18.2 亿美元，预计到 2027 年将达到 46.7 亿美元，复合年增长率为 14.4%。 二尖瓣疾病的频率上升、开创性管道设备的增加以及患有心脏病的老年人口的增加正在积极推动预测期内经导管二尖瓣植入（修复和置换）市场的增长前景。 二尖瓣反流 (MR) 是最普遍的瓣膜疾病，在美国影响了超过 400 万人。 美国每年大约记录 250,000 例二尖瓣反流病例，其中近 50,000 例患者决定接受推荐的手术。 经导管二尖瓣置换术 (TMVR) 是一种替代治疗机会，已得到显着增强，可以胜任治疗暴露于高手术风险或手术风险过高的患者的严重二尖瓣反流。

该研究概述了快速发展和增长的细分市场，以及对该行业每个要素的宝贵见解。 该行业见证了几个新参与者的进入，该报告旨在提供有关其市场转型和增长的有见地的信息。 报告概述了合并、收购、合作伙伴关系、协议、产品发布和合资企业。

要获取全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场报告的样本副本，请访问@ www.emergenresearch.com/request-sample/…

报告概述 1.1 研究范围 1.2 主要经导管二尖瓣植入市场细分 1.3 主要参与者 1.4 按产品进行的市场分析 1.5 按应用进行的市场分析 1.6 报告时间表全球增长趋势 2.1 全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场规模 2.2 最新经导管二尖瓣植入市场趋势 2.3 关键增长趋势竞争格局 3.1 全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场主要参与者 3.2 全球经导管二尖瓣植入制造商的规模 3.3 主要参与者的产品 3.4 经导管二尖瓣植入市场的进入壁垒 3.5 合并、收购、合资企业和战略联盟

要以极低的折扣价获得报告样本，请访问@ www.emergenresearch.com/request-discoun ...

区域概况：

全球经导管二尖瓣植入术市场已根据主要地理区域分为北美、亚太地区、欧洲、拉丁美洲以及中东和非洲。 它评估了全球经导管二尖瓣植入市场在主要地区的市场份额、市场规模、收入贡献、销售网络和分销渠道等关键要素。

报告中介绍的主要公司：

访问报告的完整说明@ www.emergenresearch.com/industry-report ...

经导管二尖瓣植入市场的市场细分

该市场根据类型、应用程序和区域进行细分。 每个细分市场的增长都提供了与按类型和应用分类的生产和销售量相关的准确预测。 此分析可以帮助希望通过瞄准新兴市场和利基市场来扩展业务的读者。 市场份额数据在全球和区域层面均有提供。 报告涵盖的地区包括北美、欧洲、亚太地区、拉丁美洲以及中东和非洲。 研究分析师评估主要竞争对手的市场地位，并为每家公司提供竞争分析。 对于这项研究，本报告根据产品、应用和地区对全球经导管二尖瓣植入术市场进行细分：

本报告涵盖的部分是：

产品展望（收入百万美元；2017-2027）机械瓣膜生物修复组织（生物）瓣膜应用展望（收入百万美元；2017-2027）二尖瓣狭窄二尖瓣脱垂二尖瓣反流最终用途展望（收入百万美元； 2017–2027) 医院门诊手术中心诊断中心其他

报告要点：

除了生动描述全球经导管二尖瓣植入术业务领域及其基本运营，最新报告还提供了产业链分析，并列出了当前和未来的市场趋势和增长机会。 该报告包括有关当前和历史市场情景的信息，有助于预测未来八年的市场状况。 该报告审查了影响近期市场增长的显着因素。 战略营销建议、与新市场进入者相关的重要信息以及各种业务的扩展计划有望为读者提供市场竞争优势。

感谢您阅读我们的报告。 欲了解更多详情或查询报告的定制，请告诉我们。 我们将根据您的要求为您提供报告。

关于新兴研究

我们的解决方案完全专注于您的目标，即定位、定位和分析跨人口统计、跨行业的消费者行为转变，并帮助客户做出更明智的业务决策。 我们提供市场情报研究，确保跨多个行业（包括医疗保健、接触点、化学品、类型和能源）进行相关和基于事实的研究。 我们不断更新我们的研究产品，以确保我们的客户了解市场上存在的最新趋势。 我们的行业经验和针对任何研究问题开发具体解决方案的能力为我们的客户提供了确保超越各自竞争对手的优势的能力。

原文:

Tani Shah

Posted on May 15

The latest market intelligence report, titled ‘Global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation Market’, is intended to provide the target audience with the necessary information about the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation industry. The report comprises a detailed analysis of the vital elements of the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market, including key drivers, constraints, opportunities, limitations, threats, and micro- and macro-economic factors. The report carefully investigates the present market scenario and the fundamental growth prospects. The report entails an organized database of the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market dynamics that helps market analysts estimate the global market growth rate over the projected timeline. Therefore, the report, published by Emergen Research, is a detail-oriented compilation of the crucial aspects of the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market, including the key players’ product offerings, the wide application range of these products, the major market segments, leading market contenders, their company profiles, pricing strategies, production capacities, revenue generation schemes, technological advancements, and many others.

According to the current analysis of Emergen Research, the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation Market was valued at USD 1.82 billion in 2019 and is expected to reach USD 4.67 billion by 2027, at a CAGR of 14.4%. Rise frequency of mitral valve diseases, increasing pioneering pipeline devices together with rising elderly population with heart condition is positively driving the growth prospects of the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation (repair and replacement) market in the forecast period. Mitral Regurgitation (MR) is the greatest widespread valve disorder affecting more than 4 million in total in the United States. Roughly, 250,000 cases of mitral regurgitation are recorded in the United States annually out of which close to 50,000 patients decide to undertake recommended surgery. Transcatheter mitral valve replacement (TMVR) is a substitute therapeutic opportunity which has been enhanced considerably to competently treat severe mitral regurgitation in patients who are exposed to high or prohibitive surgical risks.

The study outlines the rapidly evolving and growing market segments along with valuable insights into each element of the industry. The industry has witnessed the entry of several new players, and the report aims to deliver insightful information about their transition and growth in the market. Mergers, acquisitions, partnerships, agreements, product launches, and joint ventures are all outlined in the report.

To get a sample copy of the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market report, visit @ www.emergenresearch.com/request-sample/…

Highlights of the TOC:

Report Overview 1.1 Research Scope 1.2 Key Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market segments 1.3 Major players 1.4 Market analysis by product 1.5 Market analysis by application 1.6 Report timeline Global Growth Trends 2.1 Global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market size 2.2 Latest Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market trends 2.3 Key growth trends Competitive Landscape 3.1 Global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market key players 3.2 Global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation size by manufacturers 3.3 Products of major players 3.4 Entry barriers in the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market 3.5 Mergers, acquisitions, joint ventures, and strategic alliances

To receive a sample copy of the report at an incredibly discounted rate, visit @ www.emergenresearch.com/request-discoun…

Regional Overview:

The global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market has been categorized on the basis of key geographical regions into North America, Asia Pacific, Europe, Latin America, and Middle East & Africa. It evaluates the presence of the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market in the major regions with regards to market share, market size, revenue contribution, sales network and distribution channel, and other key elements.

Leading companies profiled in the report:

Abbott Laboratories, HLT Medical, Neovasc, Edward Lifesciences, Biotronik Private Limited, LivaNova, Colibri Heart Valve, Medtronic, NeoChord, MValve Technologies, Transcatheter Technologies GmbH and Venus Medtech

Get access to the full description of the report @ www.emergenresearch.com/industry-report…

Market Segmentations of the Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation Market

This market is segmented based on Types, Applications, and Regions. The growth of each segment provides accurate forecasts related to production and sales by Types and Applications, in terms of volume. This analysis can help readers looking to expand their business by targeting emerging and niche markets. Market share data is given on both global and regional levels. Regions covered in the report are North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, and Middle East & Africa. Research analysts assess the market positions of the leading competitors and provide competitive analysis for each company. For this study, this report segments the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation market on the basis of product, application, and region:

Segments Covered in this report are:

Product Outlook (Revenue in Million USD; 2017–2027) Mechanical Valves Bioprosthetic Tissue (Biological) Valves Application Outlook (Revenue in Million USD; 2017–2027) Mitral Valve Stenosis Mitral Valve Prolapse Mitral Valve Regurgitation End Use Outlook (Revenue in Million USD; 2017–2027) Hospitals Ambulatory Surgical Centers Diagnostic Centers Others

Report Highlights:

Besides offering a vivid depiction of the global Transcatheter Mitral Valve Implantation business sphere and its fundamental operations, the latest report provides the industrial chain analysis and list down the current and future market trends and growth opportunities. The report includes information on the present and historical market scenarios, which helps forecast the market conditions over the next eight years. The report scrutinizes the salient factors influencing the growth of the market in the near future. The strategic marketing recommendations, crucial information related to the new market entrants, and expansion plans of various businesses are poised to provide the reader with a competitive edge in the market.

Thank you for reading our report. For further details or to inquire about the customization of the report, please let us know. We will offer you the report as per your requirements.

About Emergen Research

Emergen Research is a market research and consulting company that provides syndicated research reports, customized research reports, and consulting services. Our solutions purely focus on your purpose to locate, target, and analyze consumer behavior shifts across demographics, across industries, and help clients make smarter business decisions. We offer market intelligence studies ensuring relevant and fact-based research across multiple industries, including Healthcare, Touch Points, Chemicals, Types, and Energy. We consistently update our research offerings to ensure our clients are aware of the latest trend’s existent in the market. Emergen Research has a strong base of experienced analysts from varied areas of expertise. Our industry experience and ability to develop a concrete solution to any research problems provides our clients with the ability to secure an edge over their respective competitors.
